text_overlays.content_summary: brand farewell — after years of hard work its time to say goodbye

notable_phrases: After years of hard work and beautiful memories, it’s time to say goodbye. Pretty Nature is officially closing its doors
Thank you for all the love and support over the years
We’re offering a final 80% clearance sale on all items — until everything is gone
voice_observations.caption_text:
After years of hard work and beautiful memories, it’s time to say goodbye. Pretty Nature is officially closing its doors.
Thank you for all the love and support over the years 💚
We’re offering a final 80% clearance sale on all items — until everything is gone!
Don’t miss this last chance 🛍️

بعد سنوات من العمل الجاد والذكريات الجميلة، حان الوقت لنقول وداعًا.
“بريتي نيتشر” تغلق أبوابها رسميًا.
شكرًا من القلب لكل الحب والدعم خلال السنوات الماضية 💚
نقدم خصم نهائي 80% على جميع المنتجات حتى نفاذ الكمية!
لا تفوتوا آخر فرصة 🛍️
voice_observations.hook_text: Pretty Nature is officially closing its doors.
voice_observations.voiceover_text: And letting memories go Into diamond skies Diamond skies Diamond skies And letting memories go Into diamond skies Into diamond skies Will my heart recover on its way back home? Time is a healer, so I was told I'm picking up the pieces of these broken dreams And I'm letting them go
